steps.t: The scarecrows are behind a farm-house to the east. The scarecrows must be collected before they can be placed in the fields.
The scarecrows should be placed in the fields around the Northcotton Farm. The hobbit-children will delight in seeing the scarecrows in the fields.
Milo Longfurrow is at the Northcotton Farm. Milo Longfurrow will be pleased to hear that the scarecrows are placed.
